pi_items.source: Task description lines specify exact group titles to create
Task description explicitly specifies sort order 2 for this group
Task description specifies exact group title
Task description explicitly specifies sort order 1 for this group
Task description specifies exact group title
Task description explicitly specifies sort order 3 for this group
Task description specifies exact survey title in step 3
Task description states survey must be created inside the 'Annual Tech Summit 2024' group
Task specifies Type: List (Radio). LimeSurvey documentation confirms 'L' is the legacy character code for List (Radio) questions (https://www.limesurvey.org/manual/Question_Objects)

privileged_info_summary: This task requires agents to create three survey groups in LimeSurvey with specific titles (Annual Tech Summit 2024, Global Healthcare Innovation Forum 2024, Women in Leadership Conference 2024) and sort orders (2, 1, 3 respectively). Agents must then create a survey titled 'Post-Event Satisfaction Survey - Tech Summit 2024' in the Annual Tech Summit group, set it to anonymized, and add a question group with a single List (Radio) type question (code Q01) containing 5 answer options. All metadata specifications are verified against the task description and LimeSurvey documentation.
